planning_gate.spec_delta: M19 replaces hand-built finite-horizon grids with seeded predictive sampling over trajectory parameters before attempting browser replay.

perspectives.product: tests whether derivative-free sampling can find a native visible squat plan that hand tuning missed
perspectives.architecture: keeps exp87's 3-phase teacher and samples trajectory parameters around exp92's closest non-fall branch
perspectives.security: no credentials or external side effects
perspectives.qa: native sweep records raw JSON, visible gate metrics, sampled parameter candidates, and optimizer score per rollout
perspectives.skeptic: single-batch predictive sampling may still be too small to cross the knee/contact/slip boundary

dod: raw native JSON per predictive-sampling candidate
summary ranks variants and states whether any variant passes visible_8cm_gate

sources.note: IEEE Robots Guide shows Unitree G1 in a deep squat-like pose, supporting kinematic plausibility before dynamics testing.
Humanoid squat research frames squatting as a whole-body coordination task requiring foot-force and dynamic constraints.
Whole-body constrained learning motivates adding contact and foot-terrain constraints in a low-level whole-body follower instead of reward-only tuning.
MuJoCo whole-body MPC work supports using simulator dynamics and contact modeling for legged whole-body control experiments.
MuJoCo MPC supports multiple shooting and predictive sampling style planners, motivating a finite-horizon native rollout search.
Predictive Sampling is a simple derivative-free MJPC planner that motivates seeded rollout sampling for this local gate.
